calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-07-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Amy Harrington, Esq., for Margueritte Ball, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Ms. Harrington requests a continuance of sixty (60) days to with a plan to file a Petition for Final Disribution.

The subject matter is continued to Apr-07-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared via zoom for administrator.

Ms. Harrington requested a short continuance to file her papers. Matter is continued to January 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mrs. Harrington stated that her client has finally signed the third and final inventory, that if her client is willing to sign the petition for final distribution, she can get this case wrapped up and requested a continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared by zoom for and with Margueritte Ball in person.

The parties reported that they have had some disagreement as to how the stocks/assets have been listed on the inventory and appraisal, that they have been going back and forth, and that they are down to about three items. The Report on Status of Administration is under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
